3199630.name: Senua’s Saga: Hellblade II Soundtrack
3199630.description: Sink deep into the world of Senua’s Saga: Hellblade II with the Original Soundtrack. Featuring 32 songs ranging from experimental folk style to neoclassical, with a strong emphasis on the human voice with a wide use of techniques exploring tonality, tuning and texture. Composed by the award-winning David Garcia Diaz (Audio Director on the game), and a host of exciting collaborators.
